name: Mexican Chili
recipeIngredient: 15 1/2 oz Chili beans, hot and spicy
4 oz Chili peppers, drained, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beans, undrained tomatoes, celery, onion, tomato paste, green pepper, green chilies, sugar, bay leaf, salt, marjoram, garlic powder and pepper in a crockpot.
2. Brown ground beef in a skillet; drain and stir into the tomato mixture.
3. Cook on low for 8 to 10 hours.
4. Skim off excess fat from the chili.
5. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
